title: 项目脚手架
user_visible_behavior: 开发者能跑起 Next.js 应用，访问 /api/health 返回 200
verification: 运行 npm test，tests/scaffold.test.mjs 通过
npm run dev 启动后访问 http://localhost:3000 无报错
访问 /api/health 返回 { status: 'ok' }
notes: NextAuth、Prisma、Redis 已配置，待数据库迁移

title: 词汇数据模型
user_visible_behavior: 系统能存储用户的词条，包括词根、变位形态、遭遇记录（视频来源 + 时间戳 + 原句）
verification: prisma migrate dev 成功
npm test 通过（包含词汇模型的 CRUD 测试）
能创建词条并关联遭遇记录，查询词根能返回所有变位形态
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-13 11:23: docker compose up -d postgres redis passed; docker ps confirmed esponal-postgres-1 maps 0.0.0.0:5433->5432/tcp; npx prisma migrate dev passed with Already in sync, no schema change or pending migration was found; npm test passed 8/8; temporary Prisma script created User/Word/WordEncounter and query by userId+lemma returned forms [ir,fui,fueron,vas] with encounterCount=1.
notes: 依赖 INFRA-001。Schema 需新增 Word、WordEncounter 表，参考设计文档第五节

title: 阶段一课程：发音规则 + 300 高频词
user_visible_behavior: 用户能在 Web 端看到发音规则说明（中文解释）和 300 个高频词，每个词有 TTS 音频和例句
verification: 访问 /learn/phase-1 页面正常渲染
每个词条有音频播放按钮，点击能播放 TTS 音频
中文解释内容存在且正确
npm test 通过
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-13 16:05: git status --short was empty at QA start. content/curriculum/phase1-words.json verified targetCount=300, words.length=300, partOfSpeech counts noun=100 verb=100 adjective=100, and every sampled/checked word has spanish, chinese, example, audioSrc. public/audio/words exists with 300 WAV files; sampled abierto.wav 75958 bytes, abrir-2.wav 70618 bytes, abrir.wav 70618 bytes, all >1024. node --test tests/course001.test.mjs passed 3/3; npm test passed 21/21; npm run build passed and prerendered /learn/phase-1. Clean Next dev harness on port 3006 returned /learn/phase-1 200 containing ???????????, ????, ????; /audio/words/casa.wav returned 200 audio/wav length 68416. QA accepts WAV because acceptance requires real playable TTS audio, not a hard MP3 container.
notes: 需要 UI 评审。依赖 INFRA-001。音频文件预生成存储，不实时调用 TTS

title: 语法知识库：动词变位 + 阴阳性规则
user_visible_behavior: 用户能查阅针对中文母语者写的语法解释：ser/estar/tener/ir/querer/poder 的现在时变位表，阴阳性判断规则
verification: 访问 /grammar 页面正常渲染
包含 6 个核心动词的完整变位表
阴阳性规则页面有中文类比解释
npm test 通过
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-13 15:18: npm test passed 21/21; npm run build passed; clean Next dev harness on port 3002 returned /grammar 200 containing 语法知识库 and /grammar/ser 200 containing ser 现在时变位 plus conjugation content soy/eres/nosotros. Source/content check confirmed ser, estar, tener, ir, querer, poder topics and complete present-tense forms; noun gender rules include 阳性/阴性, -ción/-sión/-dad, el día/la mano; ser vs estar comparison content exists. UI source matches Claude2 layout requirements: 220px desktop sidebar, mobile selector, semantic table, Chinese analogy block, ser/estar comparison section.
notes: 需要 UI 评审。内容由人工整理，写成 JSON/MDX 存入 /content/grammar/

title: 词库 Web 界面
user_visible_behavior: 登录用户能在 /vocab 看到自己的词条列表，按词根浏览，点击词条能看到所有遭遇记录
verification: 访问 /vocab 显示当前用户的词条
词条按词根归类，不按变位形式
点击词条展开遭遇记录列表（视频标题 + 时间戳 + 原句）
npm test 通过
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-13 15:18: npm test passed 21/21; npm run build passed; clean Next dev harness on port 3002 returned unauthenticated /vocab as 307 Location /api/auth/signin. Source check confirmed src/app/vocab/page.tsx uses getServerSession(authOptions), redirects unauthenticated users, calls getWordsByUser(session.user.id) after login, serializes encounters sorted by recent encounter; VocabAccordion implements click-to-expand rows, date dividers, encounter rows, 跳回视频 links, and empty state. Real authenticated DB browser verification was not run because no logged-in session fixture was available in this QA pass.
notes: 需要 UI 评审。依赖 VOCAB-001

title: Chrome 插件脚手架
user_visible_behavior: Chrome 插件能安装，在 YouTube 页面注入内容脚本不报错
verification: chrome://extensions 加载插件无报错
打开任意 YouTube 视频，插件 icon 激活
console 无 uncaught error
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-13 13:38: npm test passed 12/12; extension npm run build passed and emitted dist/content.js, dist/background.js, dist/popup.js; Playwright bundled Chromium loaded extension from C:\Users\wang\esponal\extension, detected chrome-extension://femikpdmddmphkepjjdgceooacjkclae/background.js service worker, opened https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ, document.documentElement.dataset.esponalExtensionReady returned 'true', document.documentElement.classList.contains('esponal-extension-ready') returned true, pageErrorCount was 0. One YouTube resource console error 403 was observed, not an uncaught extension/page exception.
notes: Manifest V3，放在 /extension 目录，独立构建流程

title: YouTube 字幕提取 + 双语叠加
user_visible_behavior: 用户在 YouTube 观看西语视频时，插件自动显示西语原文字幕和中文翻译字幕
verification: 打开有官方字幕的西语 YouTube 视频，双语字幕自动出现
打开无官方字幕的视频，降级到自动生成字幕
中文翻译显示正确（抽查 3 条）
字幕跟随视频进度更新
evidence: Codex1 2026-05-13 16:42: implemented YouTube subtitle extraction and bilingual overlay in extension/content.js using MutationObserver on .ytp-caption-segment, persistent Chinese toggle via chrome.storage.local, and popup badge state in extension/popup.js. Added server route src/app/api/translate/route.ts for POST /api/translate with MiniMax OpenAI-compatible chat/completions call (model abab5.5-chat), Redis cache key subtitle:${sha256(text)} and 7-day TTL, plus MINIMAX_API_KEY and MINIMAX_GROUP_ID in .env.example. Verification passed: npm test 25/25, npm run build, and extension npm run build.
notes: 依赖 EXT-001。翻译调用 MiniMax API（服务端代理，不在插件直接暴露 key）

title: 词形还原 + 点击查词
user_visible_behavior: 用户点击字幕中任意西语词，弹出卡片显示：词根、当前变位形式说明、中文释义，包含「加入我的词库」按钮
verification: 点击 'fui' 弹出卡片，显示词根 ir，标注「简单过去时 / 第一人称单数」
点击 'hablan' 弹出卡片，显示词根 hablar
点击「加入我的词库」后，词条出现在 /vocab 页面
弹出卡片不打断视频播放
notes: 依赖 EXT-002、VOCAB-001。词形还原服务端用 spacy es 模型，插件通过 API 调用

title: 已学词高亮
user_visible_behavior: 字幕中，课程里学过的词显示绿色，词库里保存过的词显示蓝色
verification: 在课程中学过的词在 YouTube 字幕里显示绿色高亮
词库中保存的词显示蓝色高亮
陌生词不高亮
高亮颜色不影响字幕可读性
notes: 需要 UI 评审（颜色方案）。依赖 EXT-002、VOCAB-001、COURSE-001

title: 遭遇记录跳回视频
user_visible_behavior: 用户在 /vocab 页面点击某条遭遇记录，能跳转到原 YouTube 视频的对应时间点
verification: 点击遭遇记录中的视频链接，跳转到 YouTube 并定位到正确时间戳（误差 < 2 秒）
跳转后字幕高亮正确
